title: Why Study AI Safety?
summary: A short motivation for why AI safety matters and why this section is worth reading.

notes.heading: Why this matters
notes.body: As AI systems become more capable, failures can scale from annoying mistakes to serious real-world harms.

notes.heading: Core intuition
notes.body: Safety is not just about making models smarter. It is about making sure their behavior stays reliable, controllable, and aligned with human intent.

references.title: Concrete Problems in AI Safety
references.note: Good starting point for framing AI safety as practical engineering problems.

author: Shelvia Wongso
